name: koa-fastapi-monorepo
description: 前端任意 Node 框架 + 后端 Koa/Express/Nest（monorepo）

build.frontend: test -d ${frontend_dir} && cd ${frontend_dir} && npm install --no-audit && npm run build || true
build.backend: cd ${backend_dir} && npm install --no-audit --prefer-offline && (npm run build || true)
